name: ERP Inventory & Manufacturing Generation Knowledge Pack
description: Generation rules for inventory and light manufacturing in a generated ERP: stock receipt, issue, transfer and reconciliation entries; moving-average valuation; BOM, work order, material issue to WIP and finished-goods receipt; quality inspection and asset maintenance skeletons; plus the core inventory controls a generator must enforce — negative-stock guard, append-only immutable stock ledger, correct-by-reversal, per-warehouse balances, reservations, and stock-to-GL valuation reconciliation.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established ERP, accounting and software-engineering principles, authored for LocalAIFactory as code-generation guidance. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe/SAP text, or any third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific compliance is asserted.
